column1: p102_nist_build_command_data_zip,Build Command Data.zip,Build Command Data/AM Gcode/1_cube_gcode/1_cube.gcode,1969053,.gcode,source_command_path;split_key,sampled_text,4096,141,N0001 G01 X-5.5000 Y-3.5000 Z0.0000 F800 L0,"N0001 G01 X-5.5000 Y-3.5000 Z0.0000 F800 L0
% Scan setting  (will overwritte setting in build parameter),,
theta_interlayer,67,layer by layer rotation angle in degree; replace all in BuildParameter if set
hatch_space,0.1,hatch space in mm;replace all hatchsepace setting in BuildParameter if set
laser_diameter,0.1,Laser diameter for dimension compensation in mm
base_layer_power,250,Laser power setting for base layer scan
base_layer_speed_scale,1,Slow down base scan speed by setting basespeedscale < 1
mode_island,0,0 = no island; 1 = slice before contour (for concentric); 2 = slice after contour. (ARC disabled in island mode)
island_rectangle_sideA,8,Island cell side a dimension in mm; put large number for strip
island_rectangle_sideB,8,Island cell side b dimension in mm
theta_island_cell,45,hatch angle rotation of adjacent cell
theta_island_rotation_interlayer,67,layer by layer rotation angle in degree for island slicing. "
mode_laser_path,2,Laser path mode; 1) ExactStop 2)constant build speed 3)continuous
mode_motion_control,1,1)Sin Jerk - constant Acc  2)Step Acc  3) Step velocity - max_acc = 10^8 4)Sine Jerk - constant Jerk 5) Sine Jerk - capped Acc
laser_density,0.00125,default value; L_adjusted =  L (0.6+0.4*laser_density*v); will be overwritten if auto option is set.
option_laser_density_auto,0,auto will set laser density  to 1/max(build_speed)
CM_speed_ratio,0.5,ratio for speed reduction for connecting arc in continuous mode; default 0.5
CM_turn_radius,0.05,radius of the turn in mm for continuous mode; default 0.05
CM_small_arc_acc_scale,10,Short arc continuous mode acceleration scale up factor
CM_short_line_acc_scale,1,Short line continuous mode acceleration scale up factor
small_arc_radius,1,define smallarc radus where CM_smallArcAccScale will apply
short_line_length,0.49,define short line length where CM_shortlineAccScale will apply
CM_tolerance,0.05,Tolerance (error cause by replacing corner with arc) in mm
